---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem or motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed solution

Describe the approach you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives you considered.

## Additional context

Add examples, references, mockups, or related discussions if helpful.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and discussions before opening this request.
- [ ] This request is aligned with the goals of NGB Platform.
- [ ] I understand that this issue is for feature discussion, not security reporting.
